question_text: Name two ways you could make an electromagnet stronger.
correct_answer: Any two of: increase the current (voltage), add more turns/coils of wire, use an iron core, or wrap the wire more tightly
explanation: An electromagnet's strength depends on the amount of current flowing through it and the number of wire coils. Using a metal iron core also greatly increases the magnetic field strength. These are the main factors that control how powerful an electromagnet becomes.
